title: Run bun install and verify dependency cleanup
description: After all dep changes in #14-#19, run `bun install` to regenerate bun.lock. Then `rm package-lock.json` (or note that the project should choose one lockfile). Then `bun install --production` to confirm prod-only install works (for Docker). Verify `bun x tsc --noEmit` still passes and the dependency tree is clean.
validation: Run `bun install`, confirm no errors. Run `bun x tsc --noEmit` to typecheck. Confirm package-lock.json decision (keep or remove).
